languages.text: {n}Эоганн опускает кончик аугментированного пальца в кубок и задумывается.{/n} "Анализ обнаружил в составе элементы металлов и органики, которыми покрыты внутренности фонтана. Увы, сия субстанция способна принести испившему лишь вейсалгию и полное разочарование в местном виноделии. Нет, Нунциус, мой анализ не нуждается в твоей ревизии".

{n}Eogunn inserts the tip of his augmetic finger into the goblet and pauses for study.{/n} "Analysis reveals traces of metals and organic compounds in the composition, the very same that coat the fountain's inner workings. Alas, this substance will give the drinker nothing but veisalgia and utter disappointment in the local customs of amasec making. No, Nuncius, my analysis does not require your revision."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн опускает кончик аугментированного пальца в кубок и задумывается.{/n} "Анализ обнаружил в составе элементы металлов и органики, которыми покрыты внутренности фонтана. Увы, сия субстанция способна принести испившему лишь вейсалгию и полное разочарование в местном виноделии. Нет, Нунциус, мой анализ не нуждается в твоей ревизии".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lowers the tip of his augmetic finger into the goblet and falls into contemplation.{/n} "Analysis reveals traces of metals and organic compounds within the composition, the very same that coat the fountain's innards. Alas, this substance can offer the one who partakes of it nothing but woe and utter disillusionment with the local viniculture. No, Nuntius, my analysis requires no revision from you."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn steckt seinen augmentierten Finger in den Becher, um dessen Inhalt zu untersuchen.{/n} "Analyse offenbart Spuren von Metallen und organischen Verbindungen, die auch im Inneren des Brunnens zu finden sind. Leider verursacht der Genuss dieser Substanz lediglich Veisalgia und eine Abneigung gegen die hiesige Amaseckultur. Nein, Nuncius, Ihr müsst meine Analyse nicht verifizieren."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn inserts the tip of his augmetic finger into the goblet and pauses for study.{/n} "Analysis reveals traces of metals and organic compounds in the composition, the very same that coat the fountain's inner workings. Alas, this substance will give the drinker nothing but veisalgia and utter disappointment in the local customs of amasec making. No, Nuncius, my analysis does not require your revision."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn steckt seinen augmentierten Finger in den Becher, um dessen Inhalt zu untersuchen.{/n} "Analyse offenbart Spuren von Metallen und organischen Verbindungen, die auch im Inneren des Brunnens zu finden sind. Leider verursacht der Genuss dieser Substanz lediglich Veisalgia und eine Abneigung gegen die hiesige Amaseckultur. Nein, Nuncius, Ihr müsst meine Analyse nicht verifizieren."

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡将植入物手指的尖端探入高脚杯，静止不动来进行分析。{/n}“分析显示，这其中含有金属和有机化合物残留，与喷泉内部涂层的成分完全相同。可惜，饮用此物只会让饮用者宿醉头痛，并对当地艾玛赛克酒的酿造工艺深感失望。不，努恩修斯，我的分析不需要你来修订。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn inserts the tip of his augmetic finger into the goblet and pauses for study.{/n} "Analysis reveals traces of metals and organic compounds in the composition, the very same that coat the fountain's inner workings. Alas, this substance will give the drinker nothing but veisalgia and utter disappointment in the local customs of amasec making. No, Nuncius, my analysis does not require your revision."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡将植入物手指的尖端探入高脚杯，静止不动来进行分析。{/n}“分析显示，这其中含有金属和有机化合物残留，与喷泉内部涂层的成分完全相同。可惜，饮用此物只会让饮用者宿醉头痛，并对当地艾玛赛克酒的酿造工艺深感失望。不，努恩修斯，我的分析不需要你来修订。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn insère la pointe de son doigt augmétique dans le gobelet et prend un instant pour l'étudier.{/n} « L'analyse de la composition révèle des traces de métaux et de composés organiques. Les mêmes que ceux qui recouvrent les mécanismes internes de la fontaine. Hélas, le seul effet de cette substance sur son buveur sera une veisalgie et une profonde déception au sujet de la préparation locale de l'amasec. Non, Nuncius, mon analyse ne nécessite aucune révision de ta part. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn inserts the tip of his augmetic finger into the goblet and pauses for study.{/n} "Analysis reveals traces of metals and organic compounds in the composition, the very same that coat the fountain's inner workings. Alas, this substance will give the drinker nothing but veisalgia and utter disappointment in the local customs of amasec making. No, Nuncius, my analysis does not require your revision."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn insère la pointe de son doigt augmétique dans le gobelet et prend un instant pour l'étudier.{/n} « L'analyse de la composition révèle des traces de métaux et de composés organiques. Les mêmes que ceux qui recouvrent les mécanismes internes de la fontaine. Hélas, le seul effet de cette substance sur son buveur sera une veisalgie et une profonde déception au sujet de la préparation locale de l'amasec. Non, Nuncius, mon analyse ne nécessite aucune révision de ta part. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn introduce en el cáliz la punta de su dedo aumético y hace una pausa para estudiarlo.{/n} «El análisis revela trazos de metales y compuestos orgánicos, los mismos que revisten los mecanismos internos de la fuente. Por desgracia, esta sustancia no confiere al consumidor más que una fuerte veisalgia y un desencanto absoluto con las costumbres de producción de amasec de la zona. No, Nuncius, no es necesario que revise los resultados de mi análisis».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn inserts the tip of his augmetic finger into the goblet and pauses for study.{/n} "Analysis reveals traces of metals and organic compounds in the composition, the very same that coat the fountain's inner workings. Alas, this substance will give the drinker nothing but veisalgia and utter disappointment in the local customs of amasec making. No, Nuncius, my analysis does not require your revision."

Por desgracia, esta sustancia no confiere al consumidor más que una fuerte veisalgia y un desencanto absoluto con las costumbres de producción de amasec de la zona. No, Nuncius, no es necesario que revise los resultados de mi análisis».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, ogmetik parmağının ucunu kadehe sokuyor ve incelemek için duraklıyor.{/n} "Analizler, bileşimde çeşmenin iç mekanizmalarını kaplayan metallerin ve organik bileşiklerin izlerini ortaya koyuyor. Ne yazık ki bu madde, içene yerel amasek üretim geleneğine karşı kalıntısal baş ağrısı ve tam bir hayal kırıklığından başka bir şey vermeyecek. Hayır Nuncius, analizim düzeltme gerektirmiyor."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn inserts the tip of his augmetic finger into the goblet and pauses for study.{/n} "Analysis reveals traces of metals and organic compounds in the composition, the very same that coat the fountain's inner workings. Alas, this substance will give the drinker nothing but veisalgia and utter disappointment in the local customs of amasec making. No, Nuncius, my analysis does not require your revision."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, ogmetik parmağının ucunu kadehe sokuyor ve incelemek için duraklıyor.{/n} "Analizler, bileşimde çeşmenin iç mekanizmalarını kaplayan metallerin ve organik bileşiklerin izlerini ortaya koyuyor. Ne yazık ki bu madde, içene yerel amasek üretim geleneğine karşı kalıntısal baş ağrısı ve tam bir hayal kırıklığından başka bir şey vermeyecek. Hayır Nuncius, analizim düzeltme gerektirmiyor."

languages.text: {n}エオガンはオーグメティックの指先を酒杯に差し入れ、調査のために動きを止めた。{/n}「分析の結果、組成に金属と有機化合物の痕跡が認められます。噴水の内部機構を覆っているものとまったく同じものです。残念ながら、この物質が飲む者に与えるのは宿酔と、この地のアマセック醸造の慣習への深い失望だけでしょう。いいえ、ヌンキウス、私の分析にあなたの修正は不要です」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn inserts the tip of his augmetic finger into the goblet and pauses for study.{/n} "Analysis reveals traces of metals and organic compounds in the composition, the very same that coat the fountain's inner workings. Alas, this substance will give the drinker nothing but veisalgia and utter disappointment in the local customs of amasec making. No, Nuncius, my analysis does not require your revision."
